channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its second day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11...

item.title: How 9 AI Agents Collaborate to Code, Test, and Deploy Automatically
item.description: Modern software development is fractal. Every feature touches 5-10 contexts simultaneously. A single LLM struggles to maintain multi-domain coherence. This is the problem Agent Swarm solves. 9...

item.title: LXC vs. KVM unter Proxmox: Entscheidungs‑Guide für Container und VMs
item.description: Hook – Warum Sie heute nachts über LXC vs. KVM nachdenken sollten Stellen Sie sich vor, Sie stehen um 02:00 Uhr vor Ihrem Server‑Rack, plötzlich springt das Monitoring‑Alarmgeräusch auf:...

item.title: Choosing a Vector Database in 2026: pgvector vs. Pinecone vs. Qdrant vs. Weaviate vs. Milvus
item.description: Every RAG tutorial pulls the same move. It walks you through embeddings, chunking, retrieval, and then right at the moment of truth it says "now pick a vector database" and just... moves on. Like...

item.title: Why LTE is Still Relevant in the 5G Era
item.description: The 5G Hype is Real- But So is the Gap When 5G was announced, the narrative was clear: faster speeds, lower latency, massive connectivity. The marketing was aggressive. The timelines were...

item.title: prongC: A Static Analysis Tool That Helps You Detect C Shared Data Accesses
item.description: If you've ever stared at a large C codebase wondering whether two function calls touch the same shared state, you know the pain. Manual code review is error-prone, and full program analysis can be...

item.title: I built 128 things with AI. 127 are dead. So I started shipping into real OSS instead.
item.description: i built 128 things with AI in four months. then i made an AI dissect every one of them, and the verdict was uncomfortable: good at building, beginner at distribution, and 127 of them are already...

item.title: How we connected off-page content to actual revenue with a small Calendly to HubSpot webhook
item.description: For a long time our demo bookings showed up in the CRM with a source of (direct). Someone read a Reddit answer, clicked through, booked a call, and as far as our data was concerned, fell out of...

item.title: Shipping a Local LLM API with FastAPI and Ollama
item.description: Phase 2 of the de-swarm project — how I turned a 3B text-to-SQL model into a production API for $0. The setup Three weeks ago, I distilled a 120B+ text-to-SQL pipeline into a 3B QLoRA fine-tune of...

item.title: AI Doesn't Read Your Mind. It Reads Your Trail.
item.description: AI Doesn't Read Your Mind It only feels that way because it's become incredibly good at predicting where your thoughts are going. Every day I see more people approaching AI as if it were magic....

item.title: Google’s new rules for the app store will allow alternative billing next week
item.description: While the court still hasn't signed off on the massive settlement resolving Epic's antitrust lawsuit against Google for having a monopoly over Android's app store with Google Play, the tech giant...

item.title: So what is an agent?
item.description: Hello, I'm Maneshwar. I'm building git-lrc, a Micro AI code reviewer that runs on every commit. It is free and source-available on Github. Star git-lrc to help devs discover the project. Do give...

item.title: Prime Day deals under $50 that are really worth it
item.description: If you’re looking for a good deal without spending hundreds, Prime Day discounts have pushed some of our favorite products under $50. You can pick up everything from Nintendo Switch games to...

item.title: The $27 million Al proxy war over Alex Bores ends in a draw
item.description: The expensive, $27 million political proxy war between Anthropic and OpenAI came to a draw last night when Alex Bores, a New York state Assemblyman whose popularity surged after being targeted by...

item.title: CISA Warns Critical Lantronix EDS5000 Flaw Is Being Actively Exploited
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday warned of active exploitation of a critical security flaw impacting Lantronix EDS5000 Series devices, urging Federal...

item.title: The top tech Prime Day deals to shop on day two
item.description: Welcome to day two of Amazon’s four-day Prime Day event, which, if we’re being honest, looks a lot like day one. That’s actually good news, though, because many of the best deals are still around,...

item.title: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
item.description: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

item.title: Riot now lets you enable its anti-cheat when you want to
item.description: If League of Legends and Valorant players have the right hardware and elect to opt into "pre-boot security mechanisms and Windows' own native protection features," then, starting today, they can...

item.title: UK staff at the foundation that runs Wikipedia seeks union recognition
item.description: UK-based staff at the Wikimedia Foundation (WMF), the nonprofit that supports Wikipedia, are pushing forward with their unionization drive. On Wednesday, the staff sent a letter to WMF management...

item.title: Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
item.description: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.

item.title: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
item.description: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plug-ins for various tasks using AI.

item.title: Figma now has AI motion graphics and shader tools
item.description: Figma has revealed some new design and coding product updates at its annual Config conference that aim to help creatives "push their ideas further" and automate tedious tasks with AI. Part of this...

item.title: 52 Prime Day steals under $25 you won’t want to miss
item.description: We at The Verge love a good gadget or tchotchke, especially when it’s not too expensive. But with the rising cost of just about everything these days, many once-cheap gadgets aren’t so affordable...

item.title: The solar-powered Birdbuddy Pro is on sale for $168, the lowest price yet
item.description: For anyone looking to add some fun tech to their yard, the Birdbuddy Pro with solar panels is $168 at Amazon for Prime Day (usually around $240). This Internet connected birdhouse has a...

item.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
Amadey and StealC Malware Network Disrupted, 27M Stolen Credentials Recovered
item.description: A coordinated law enforcement operation, in partnership with private sector companies, including Bitdefender, Bitsight, ESET, and Microsoft, has resulted in the takedown of criminal infrastructure...

item.title: Europe’s extreme heat is shutting down power plants
item.description: Europe is in the middle of a record-breaking heat wave, and the grid is being pushed to its limits as people turn to fans and air-conditioning to try to stay cool. Some power plants won’t be...

item.title: The Trump White House Is Over Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei
item.description: At high-stakes meetings with the White House, Anthropic's cofounder—a "weirdo," per one official—has been replaced by cofounder Tom Brown.

item.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
item.description: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

item.title: 3 days left to save up to $190 on your TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 pass
item.description: You have just 3 days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.
